sglang.title: Fix `is_multimodal_model` judge
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
if isinstance(model, str):
    return "llava" or "yi-vl" in model
The above logic is wrong, when model is llama-7b, it returns "llava" but not True or False.

vllm.title: Add one example to run batch inference distributed on Ray
vllm.author: c21
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to add an example to run vLLM batch inference in a multi-nodes environment.
Ray Data is used here to orchestrate the workflow:

Read from multiple input files on cloud storage.
Start vLLM engines on multiple nodes, run inference on all input in parallel.
Write the result and prompt back t
